themes.label: Love
themes.summary: This chapter foregrounds love, affection, covenant loyalty, or sacrificial care. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "Jerome on Commentary on Titus: Older men should be sober, honorable, chaste, sound in faith,...". Word-study detail reinforces "ἀγάπῃ: in charity - love, i.e., affection or benevolence; specially (plural) a love-feast".
